mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS songId, s.name AS songName, s.album AS album, s.lyrics AS lyrics, s.duration AS duration, s.style AS style, s.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.audio_url AS audioUrl, s.release_time AS releaseTime, s.artist_id AS artistId, s.artist_name AS artistName, s.favorite_count AS favoriteCount FROM tb_song s
and s.id= #{id}
and s.artist_id=#{artistId}
and s.name like concat('%',#{songName},'%')
and s.album like concat('%',#{album},'%')
and s.style like concat('%',#{style},'%')
ORDER BY s.id DESC

SELECT s.id AS songId, s.name AS songName, s.album AS album, s.duration AS duration, s.style AS style, s.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.audio_url AS audioUrl, s.release_time AS releaseTime, s.artist_name AS artistName, s.favorite_count AS favoriteCount, s.lyrics AS lyrics, s.lyrics_head AS lyricsHead, s.nested AS nested FROM tb_user_favorite uf INNER JOIN tb_song s ON uf.song_id = s.id WHERE uf.user_id = #{userId} AND uf.type = 0 ORDER BY uf.create_time DESC

SELECT g.style_id FROM tb_genre g WHERE g.song_id IN
#{songId}

SELECT s.id AS songId, s.name AS songName, s.album AS album, s.lyrics AS lyrics, s.duration AS duration, s.style AS style, s.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.audio_url AS audioUrl, s.release_time AS releaseTime, s.artist_name AS artistName, s.favorite_count AS favoriteCount FROM tb_song s LEFT JOIN tb_playlist_song ps ON s.id = ps.song_id WHERE ps.playlist_id=#{playlistId}

SELECT s.id AS songId, s.name AS songName, s.album AS album, s.lyrics AS lyrics, s.duration AS duration, s.style AS style, s.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.audio_url AS audioUrl, s.release_time AS releaseTime, s.artist_name AS artistName, t.playCount FROM tb_song s INNER JOIN (SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS playCount FROM tb_play_record WHERE create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(NOW()) + 7 DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AND create_time < DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(NOW()) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY song_id ORDER BY playCount DESC LIMIT 200) t ON s.id = t.song_id ORDER BY t.playCount DESC;

SELECT s.id AS songId, s.name AS songName, s.album AS album, s.lyrics AS lyrics, s.duration AS duration, s.style AS style, s.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.audio_url AS audioUrl, s.release_time AS releaseTime, s.artist_name AS artistName, t.playCount FROM tb_song s INNER JOIN (SELECT song_id, COUNT(*) AS playCount FROM tb_play_record WHERE create_time >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AND create_time < DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY song_id LIMIT 200) t ON s.id = t.song_id ORDER BY t.playCount DESC;

SELECT id AS songId, name AS songName, album AS album, lyrics AS lyrics, lyrics_head AS lyricsHead, nested AS nested, duration AS duration, style AS style, cover_url AS coverUrl, audio_url AS audioUrl, release_time AS releaseTime, artist_id AS artistId, artist_name AS `artistname`, favorite_count AS favoriteCount
FROM tb_song WHERE id IN
#{songId}
ORDER BY FIELD(id,
#{songId} )
